introSection: Fantasia Special is a steel roller coaster located at Tongdo Fantasia in Yangsan, Gyeongsangbuk-do, South Korea. Built by Arrow Dynamics, it was the only roller coaster in the world with a triple corkscrew from its opening in 1993 to 2014. It is also unusual in that the corkscrew element precedes the vertical loops. It has been standing but not operating since the closure of the park in 2020.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The coaster originally had red track with white supports, but became multi-coloured in 2015.

fullText:
Fantasia Special is a steel roller coaster located at Tongdo Fantasia in Yangsan, Gyeongsangbuk-do, South Korea. Built by Arrow Dynamics, it was the only roller coaster in the world with a triple corkscrew from its opening in 1993 to 2014. It is also unusual in that the corkscrew element precedes the vertical loops. It has been standing but not operating since the closure of the park in 2020.

The coaster originally had red track with white supports, but became multi-coloured in 2015.
